image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you that not all research is peer-reviewed?
Context visual: Preprints are research papers shared before peer review. They spark debate and discovery.
Escalation visual: But why are they controversial? Some argue they spread misinformation.
Evidence visual: Yet, they accelerate scientific progress, allowing immediate feedback and collaboration.
Payoff visual: So, preprints are a double-edged sword—informative but needing caution.
Cta visual: Follow for more insights on science and stay informed!
